title: Chris Abel
compiled_truth: Chris Abel is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-17 to 2002-06-07), Chris Abel sent 72 and received 634 emails, totalling 706 interactions. Top correspondents: [Shona Wilson](people/shona-wilson) (51), [Beth Apollo](people/beth-apollo) (35), [Rick Buy](people/rick-buy) (34), [David Port](people/david-port) (33), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (32). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, dpr, ees_mgmt, inbox, notes_inbox.
